compiled_state.title: test-batched.sh: 4 e2e tests fail with 50s timeout in batch -> pass when run individually
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During commit workflow test run using test-batched.sh --timeout=50, 4 tests were reported FAIL that pass when run individually:
- tests/scripts/test-bridge-observability-e2e.sh
- tests/scripts/test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh
- tests/scripts/test-bug-report-integration.sh
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh

## Expected Behavior
All tests should pass in the test-batched.sh batch run with the same 50s timeout they pass individually.

## Actual Behavior
The 4 tests show as FAIL in the batch summary. When run immediately afterward individually, they all pass within 30s. Root cause: likely tests exceed 50s wall-clock time when system is under load from running 270+ prior tests in the same session.

## Impact
Commit workflow Step 1 reports test failures that are not real failures, requiring manual re-verification.

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — prior fix 720cbc2a fixed 3/4 tests, test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh still uses clone_test_repo at line 31 (high confidence). Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). ROOT_CAUSE: test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh uses clone_test_repo+ticket init (unfixed pattern), which fails under batch load due to silent ticket init failures. Fix: convert to clone_ticket_repo pattern (same as other 3 fixed tests in commit 720cbc2a). testing_mode=GREEN (test setup change, not behavioral assertion change)
comments.author: Test
